compiled_state.title: Update project docs to reflect Docker E2E test infrastructure
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

**What**: Update project documentation to reflect the new Docker E2E test infrastructure
**Why**: Future developers and agents need to know the E2E tests exist, how to run them, and how DSO_E2E_MODE works
**Scope**:
- IN: CLAUDE.md updates (test suite reference, DSO_E2E_MODE documentation), README updates (E2E test instructions)
- OUT: New documentation files — updates only

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, CLAUDE.md references the E2E test suite and DSO_E2E_MODE environment variable
  ← Satisfies: "Structured diagnostic output on failure" (documentation enables debugging)
- When this story is complete, README contains instructions for running the E2E test suite locally via Docker (optional) and describes CI-only execution

Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md for documentation formatting, structure, and conventions.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
